calibration.calibration_note: With hazard_harm=0.02, avg episode ~182 steps (was ~18 with 0.5). Actual episode time higher.

items.title: MECH-341 retune 6-arm validation (supersedes V3-EXQ-611)
items.note: MECH-341 retune validation. Substrate change: e3_selector.py applies stratified_select on the uncommitted (multinomial) branch too (was committed-only); fixes V3-EXQ-611 n_stratified_fired=0 across all 3 seeds. 6-arm factorial: 3 option groups (OPT1_only/OPT2_only/BOTH) x 2 entropy_bias_scale values (1.0/2.0). PASS gate: C1 (stratified fires across all OPT2/BOTH seeds) AND (C2 bonus scale-commensurate OR C3 substrate produces selected-class diversity). NO config default changes per implement-substrate skill rule -- scales passed via cfg_overrides. ALL_OFF baseline established by V3-EXQ-611 manifest already on origin/master. See substrate_queue.json MECH-341 retune entry + behavioral_diversity_isolation_plan.md R2.c rule.

items.title: Phase 3 cutover end-to-end smoke (cloud-2 retry)
items.note: V3-EXQ-612 was run by Mac at 17:25 but Mac runner had no COORDINATION_MODE env so report_result was a no-op. Retry on cloud-2 which has the proper env to demonstrate the full Phase 3 cycle.
